findings.rule_text: Touch targets should be 56dp (optimal), and no smaller than 48dp minimum.
findings.evidence_from_telemetry: 3 grab attempts on 'settings_toggle', 2 failed (fail rate 67%); failed distance_to_target 0.39-0.44m (mean 0.41m); eventual success at 0.06m; 2.9s of hand-pose-only hesitation before the first attempt; distance_to_target stdev 0.20m across attempts.
findings.suggested_fix: Enlarge the interactive/grab collider of 'settings_toggle' to >=56dp (>=48dp min) and confirm the collider matches the visual bounds so users aren't reaching 0.44m off-target; add a hover/focus highlight and press confirmation so the target is acquirable on the first try (compare against clean targets that succeed <0.10m).

findings.suggested_fix: Enlarge the interactive/grab collider of 'settings_toggle' to >=56dp (>=48dp min) and confirm the collider matches the visual bounds so users aren't reaching 0.47m off-target; add a hover/focus highlight and press confirmation so the target is acquirable on the first try (compare against clean targets that succeed <0.10m).

findings.rule_text: Elevated/orbiter-style elements should hold controls, not primary scrollable content.
findings.suggested_fix: Move scrollable primary content out of the elevated/orbiter 'notes_panel' into a standard anchored panel; keep only controls in elevated elements per platform convention.
